title: Swords From Regal Bones
description: This is a CIT pack that adds pixel art versions of three of Regal Bones's swords that I liked, along with a full tool set for the light thief :)
body:
This pack requires optifine!

The items included are as follows...
- Light Thief
- Light Pickaxe
- Light Axe
- Light Shovel
- Light Hoe
- Light Shield
- Light Bow
- Shattered Soul
- Reef

To use in game rename the corresponding diamond or netherite tool to the item you want.

This pack also changes the default shield to match the model inaccuracy of the light shield.

Check out Regal Bones's stuff! https://regal-bones.tumblr.com/
